caption: A man wearing a green baseball cap, black headphones, and a green t-shirt with the text "ION NEVER DO SHIT" in stylized white letters sits in a room that appears to be a clothing store or studio. The background features a wall decorated with numerous framed photographs and a clothing rack with various garments. A white mannequin dressed in a white top stands behind him. A black professional microphone is positioned directly in front of the man. On-screen logos include a circular emblem with the word "SIT" and a red logo that reads "BODELY TOT". Across the frames, the man remains in the same position, speaking and subtly shifting his facial expressions and head posture. His lips move as he talks, and his gaze shifts slightly, while the camera and surroundings remain static.
